text: Welcome to the community, guide_sam! You've been approved as an event helper. Looking forward to your contributions to our events!
Welcome to the community, helper_alex! You've been approved as a moderator. Thanks for volunteering to help keep our space safe and welcoming!
Welcome to the community, newbie_kim! You've been approved as a member. We're glad to have you here!
Welcome to the community, mentor_lina! You've been approved as a mentor. Your guidance will be invaluable to our newer members!
